channel.title: Pillars of Eternity on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in Pillars of Eternity on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Data On My Games
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to look at data, specifically data for my own games.

item.title: Developing Pillars Of Eternity
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about developing pillars of Eternity.
